package rulefixtures

	"net/http"
)

// scenario for missing_rate_limiting_on_auth_endpoint: login/authentication handler functions (name contains `Login`, `Authenticate`, `SignIn`) that don't reference rate limiting, throttling, or brute-force protection mechanisms
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func Loginscenario725Positive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
